# synthetic runtime cassettes

Provider-neutral **synthetic** runtime cassettes
([`ExternalRuntimeCassette`](../../../../crates/agent-testkit/src/external/cassette.rs))
that are not tied to a real CLI build. They exist so the cassette schema, loader,
redaction guard, and offline replay layer are covered without waiting for the
concrete Claude/Codex/OpenCode adapters (M6–M8).

- `full_stream.json` — a single `Start → Completed` turn whose observations cover
  every synthetic event category the task requires (text delta, command
  start/finish, permission request, tool call, completion). Regenerated by the
  `external_cassette_regenerate_fixtures` test in
  [`tests/agent_external_cassette.rs`](../../../agent_external_cassette.rs) when
  `AGENT_LIB_UPDATE_EXTERNAL_CASSETTES=1` is set; a normal run leaves it a no-op.
- `forward_compat.json` — hand-authored cassette carrying unrecognised fields at
  the top, runtime, turn, and frame levels, proving the loader preserves unknown
  fields (`extra`) rather than dropping them or failing.
